name: VINCE HOLDING CORP.
business: Vince Holding Corp. operates the Vince brand, selling women's and men's ready-to-wear apparel and accessories. It sells through wholesale channels (major department stores and specialty stores) and direct-to-consumer (retail stores, e-commerce).

exposures.sentence: We are a global retail company that operates the Vince brand women's and men's ready to wear business.
